title: deschampsia alpina var. wibeliana
intro: Deschampsia alpina var. wibeliana, also known as Alpine Hair Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Deschampsia alpina var. wibeliana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
